SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
SETTINGS.SUBTITLE: Manage all your settings in one place.

ITEMS.BUSINESS_SETTINGS_DESC: Customise business details, manage branches, covered addresses and etc.
ITEMS.ROUNDING_SETTINGS_DESC: Configure how numbers are adjusted to a specific level of precision.
ITEMS.BRANCH_SETTINGS_DESC: Manage your branch details, addresses, working hours, and operational settings.
ITEMS.CUSTOM_FIELDS_DESC: Add your fields and define the location rules.
ITEMS.PRODUCTS_TAB_BUILDER_DESC: Define the default content tabs shown on every product.
ITEMS.PREFIX_SETTINGS_DESC: Customize the prefixes for various document types.
ITEMS.POS_OPTIONS_DESC: Configure and manage point of sale options, including cashier settings, sales restrictions, printing preferences.
ITEMS.INVOICE_OPTIONS_DESC: Configure invoice options, default notes, terms and conditions.
ITEMS.MANAGE_TAX_DESC: Configure tax rates, tax groups, and tax rules for your business transactions.
ITEMS.LABEL_BUILDER_DESC: Design and manage custom label templates for your products.
ITEMS.PRICE_LABEL_DESC: Create and manage price label templates for your products.
ITEMS.SURCHARGE_DESC: Configure surcharge rules, amounts, and application methods.
ITEMS.COVERED_ADDRESS_DESC: Define and manage addresses where your business provides delivery or service.
ITEMS.COVERED_ZONE_DESC: Set up and manage specific geographic zones for delivery or service.
ITEMS.SHIPPING_DESC: Set up and manage shipping methods and rates.
ITEMS.SHIPPING_OPTIONS_DESC: Configure additional shipping options and preferences.
ITEMS.PAYMENT_METHODS_DESC: Payment methods, currencies, and configuration for linking to POS and website.
ITEMS.SERVICE_MANAGEMENT_DESC: Configure the services your business offers, including service types and pricing.
ITEMS.IMPORT_FROM_INVO_DESC: Import company data from another Invo account.
